title: HowMany
description: Adds a sidebar to the right side of the screen to tell you how many of a specific item you have in your inventory.
body:
# HowMany?
The name is quite self explanatory within itself it tells you **how many** of an item you have!

## The Looks
My mod tries it's best to emulate the vanilla art style, while also making it clean for you to look at!
![The mod tells the user that 1552 sticks to trade with a villager](https://i.imgur.com/Z9RQAg7.png)
![The mod tells the user that they have 270 cobblestone to bridge with](https://i.imgur.com/BvmB74r.png)
![The mod tells the user that they have 128 arrows to shoot with](https://i.imgur.com/4DE7J1P.png)

## Usage
To add a block to the sidebar, just press the letter L on the keyboard while hovering over it in your inventory.
